background.summary: The user is continuing a long-running personal analysis conversation and wants continuity without re-explaining the full backstory.
emotionalContext: The user is under emotional strain and uses the model as a continuity layer for reflection.
The handoff should preserve interpersonal context instead of flattening the story into generic advice.

peopleMap.name: Primary person
peopleMap.notes: The user keeps returning to this relationship as the main source of pain and analysis.

peopleMap.notes: Matters because shared living context shapes the user's behavior and interpretation.
